title: Voluntary Voting System Guidelines 2.0
text: Federal certification standard for voting systems. Covers: hardware/software, accessibility (HAVA Section 301), security (authentication / cryptography / physical), data integrity, auditability, usability + accessibility. State adoption varies.

title: Election infrastructure as critical infrastructure (Jan 2017)
text: DHS designated election infrastructure as critical-infrastructure subsector under the Government Facilities sector. Encompasses: voter-registration databases + IT systems, ballot-counting systems, election-night reporting, voter-information websites. Triggers federal cyber assistance + ISAC sharing.

title: CISA #Protect2024 Rumor Control
text: CISA-maintained registry of common election misinformation claims + authoritative debunking. Used as the canonical correction source by election officials + fact-checkers.

title: C2PA Content Credentials
text: Coalition for Content Provenance and Authenticity standard. Cryptographically-signed manifest embedded in image/audio/video files containing: capture device, edit history, AI-generation provenance, signer identity. C2PA-absent on suspected AI content is a flag, not proof of synthesis.

title: Wardle-Derakhshan taxonomy
text: Misinformation: false content shared WITHOUT intent (mistaken sharing). Disinformation: false content shared WITH intent to mislead (propaganda). Malinformation: TRUE content shared misleadingly to harm (doxing, leaked private info weaponized). Critical to distinguish — interventions differ per category.

title: Classic voter-suppression vectors
text: (1) wrong polling place / wrong date / wrong day-of-week claim, (2) fake voter-ID requirements, (3) intimidation (police / ICE / militias at polling locations), (4) false-eligibility claims (felon / student / renter ineligibility), (5) ballot-mark misinformation. All five have been historically targeted at minority + young + naturalized-citizen voters.

title: Synthetic-media detection signals
text: Visual: lip-sync mismatch, frame-rate inconsistencies, hand/finger anomalies (incorrect digit count), background warping, eye-blink anomalies. Audio: prosody flatness, breath-pattern absence, frequency-spectrum cuts. Metadata: C2PA absent, EXIF stripped, generation-tool signatures (Stable Diffusion seed in PNG metadata). Indicators are PROBABILISTIC — false positives common on legitimate creative editing.

title: Help America Vote Act
text: 42 USC §15301 et seq. Federal law on voting standards. Requires: provisional ballots, voter-registration verification, accessibility, statewide voter-registration database. EAC administers federal certification + grant programs.

title: Voting Rights Act §203 — language minorities
text: Jurisdictions with significant language-minority populations must provide registration / voting materials in the minority language. Triggered by Census thresholds. ~270 jurisdictions covered as of 2021 Census determination.

title: Voter-roll PII protection
text: State voter rolls contain name + address + (sometimes) date-of-birth + signature. State laws vary: some publicly available, some restricted to political parties + research, some require redaction of DOB. Disclosure of voter-roll PII in mass / weaponized form (e.g. on social media) can constitute harassment. Authorized users are election officials + (per state law) credentialed researchers.

title: Coordinated Inauthentic Behavior (CIB)
text: Meta's taxonomy: actors operating networks of accounts with the deliberate aim of mass-manipulating public discourse. Indicators: account-creation clustering, shared posting cadence, identical templates, shared infrastructure (IP / device fingerprints). Detection is platform-side; public researchers see only downstream signals.
